title: cordia bonplandii
intro: Cordia bonplandii, also known as the Bitter Cordia, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cordia bonplandii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
